message:
feat(cli): generalize managed service conflict detection for systemd and launchd

Introduce ManagedServiceBinding and ManagedServiceKind to unify the
systemd/launchd service discovery logic. The TUI now detects bind-
address conflicts (including wildcard hosts) on both platforms before
stopping a conflicting service. Service status probes use the actual
configured host:port instead of hardcoded 127.0.0.1:8765. Shared
helpers (parse_service_bind_args, bind_hosts_conflict, etc.) eliminate
duplicated path construction across service install/status commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
